initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    c_customer_sk,
    c_customer_id,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_purchase_amount
FROM 
    catalog_sales
JOIN 
    customer ON catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_month_seq = 1200
GROUP BY 
    c_customer_sk, c_customer_id
ORDER BY 
    total_purchase_amount DESC
LIMIT 100
